title: D-3 — Promote RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1 working-model -> automated
description: Promote RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1 tierState.activeTier from working-model to automated. D-2 (merge SHA 8240f6a4e1009f0db83d18218c3c83aad16a3a15, PR #98) is the evidenceClass: the extended .github/workflows/pr-mergeability-check.yml workflow enforces substrate-artifact-link presence on PR comments when the override-unstable-merge label is applied. Workflow self-evidencing via its enforcement on next override PR. Promotion via canonical mechanism exercised five times in the foundation arc / FU block / D-COMMS sequence (FU-D-2, FU-D-3, FU-D-4, D-COMMS-2, and now this): version bump 1.0.0 -> 1.1.0, append promotion transition with evidenceClass citing D-2 merge SHA, flip tierState.activeTier to automated, append closure note to notes field. lifecycleStatus REMAINS working-model — promotion is on the tier axis only.

outputs.description: Promote RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1 via canonical mechanism. Four edits on the rule instance: (a) version 1.0.0 -> 1.1.0; (b) tierState.activeTier 'working-model' -> 'automated'; (c) append working-model -> automated transition with evidenceClass citing D-2 SHA 8240f6a4e1009f0db83d18218c3c83aad16a3a15 + PR #98; (d) append closure note to notes field with '| PROMOTED 2026-06-02:' separator. lifecycleStatus REMAINS working-model — promotion is on the tier axis only.
acceptanceCriteria: lifecycleStatus REMAINS 'working-model' (no change — tier axis promotion only)

transitions.trigger: Spec authored against verified D-2 merge state. D-2 (merge SHA 8240f6a4e1009f0db83d18218c3c83aad16a3a15, PR #98) extended .github/workflows/pr-mergeability-check.yml to enforce substrate-artifact-link requirement on override scenarios. Workflow live on main HEAD 56e21e4 with 107 lines confirmed. RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1 promotion via canonical mechanism: same 4-edit shape exercised in D-COMMS-2 (PR #92) and three prior FU-block promotions. Sandbox pre-validation passed: promoted rule instance validates against rule.schema.json v1.2.0 with external $refs neutered.
PROCEED STEP 2 issued; four-edit canonical promotion applied
Two commits authored; PR opened; CI green
Post-merge verification: RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1 at version 1.1.0 with tierState.activeTier=automated; rules-at-automated count = 5; L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT arc complete

notes: Third and final deliverable in the L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT arc. D-1 (L9 reconcile) merged in PR #96. D-2 (workflow extension) merged in PR #98. This deliverable promotes the rule via canonical mechanism. Pattern complete: L9-reconcile + workflow-extension + rule-promotion is the canonical 3-deliverable shape for any future rule promotion arc. Rules-at-automated count grows 4 -> 5. The L4-OVERRIDE incident pattern from PR #269 (legitimate L4 conscious override of UNSTABLE CI without contemporaneous substrate artifact) is now mechanically prevented — override label without substrate-artifact-link in PR comments fails the pr-mergeability-check workflow. Pure data fix on a single rule instance — no source schema edits, no CI workflow authoring, no code changes. The CI substrate (extended pr-mergeability-check.yml) already exists on main from D-2; this deliverable just records that the rule's automated tier is now operationally backed and flips the activeTier accordingly. Cross-chat-relay origin: EB-agent contributed the rule via FU filing on 2026-06-01 alignment prompt; SR chat schematized and now promotes. Attribution preserved in rule instance authority.author block.
